'''鈭歞-ng-k-zh''' ('''kadangkezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cuff|cuff]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ng-k-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cuff|cuff]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-ng-k-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kadangkezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidangkezhoko|thidangkezhoko]] || [[word:jidangkezhoko|jidangkezhoko]] || [[word:shidangkezhoko|shidangkezhoko]] || [[word:kidangkezhoko|kidangkezhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudangkezhoko|thuthudangkezhoko]] || [[word:jujudangkezhoko|jujudangkezhoko]] || [[word:shushudangkezhoko|shushudangkezhoko]] || [[word:kukudangkezhoko|kukudangkezhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodangkezhoko|thodangkezhoko]] || [[word:jodangkezhoko|jodangkezhoko]] || [[word:shodangkezhoko|shodangkezhoko]] || [[word:kodangkezhoko|kodangkezhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodangkezhoko|thodangkezhoko]] || [[word:jodangkezhoko|jodangkezhoko]] || [[word:shodangkezhoko|shodangkezhoko]] || [[word:kodangkezhoko|kodangkezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dangkezhoko|th忙dangkezhoko]] || [[word:j忙dangkezhoko|j忙dangkezhoko]] || [[word:sh忙dangkezhoko|sh忙dangkezhoko]] || [[word:k忙dangkezhoko|k忙dangkezhoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadangkezhoko|thadangkezhoko]] || [[word:jadangkezhoko|jadangkezhoko]] || [[word:shadangkezhoko|shadangkezhoko]] || [[word:kadangkezhoko|kadangkezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadangkezhoko|thadangkezhoko]] || [[word:jadangkezhoko|jadangkezhoko]] || [[word:shadangkezhoko|shadangkezhoko]] || [[word:kadangkezhoko|kadangkezhoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
